summary: n8n Payload Strategy for EmDash Bilingual Posts
description: When inserting content via n8n into EmDash (either by writing directly to Cloudflare D1, or via the EmDash API / seed file), ensure you follow this structure to maintain the bilingual link.

data.title: Mi Nuevo Post
data.content: Contenido completo en formato PortableText o HTML según se configure...

data.title: My New Post
data.content: Full content in PortableText or HTML format...

n8n_workflow_notes: 1. Ensure the Spanish post is created FIRST to secure the base slug.
2. The English post MUST have the 'translation_of' field set to the exactly same slug of the Spanish post.
3. Use 'external_id' for idempotent operations in n8n (so you don't duplicate records if the workflow runs twice).
4. Taxonomies (tags and categories) must match exactly what is defined in the seed.json taxonomy definitions.
